response.step_by_step_log: Identified the performer as Koseki Bijou based on visual cues and on-screen text. Performed a search with the query 'Koseki Bijou "ROCK IN!" lyrics'. Found the lyrics on multiple sites confirming the song title is "ROCK IN!". The song is in English, so OG and EN lyrics are identical.
response.global_summary: A music video featuring a 3D animated performance of the song "ROCK IN!" by VTuber Koseki Bijou, followed by a short comedic dialogue segment.

scenes.description: Koseki Bijou performs the song "ROCK IN!" with 3D animation.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Now you know what's up
Hit 'em with a one-two-three, Biboo, Biboo
Come and test your luck
Yeah, we're comin' in clutch, Biboo, Biboo
Skipping stone in flight
Take 'em out one-shot, Biboo, Biboo
Better hit quicksave 'cause Biboo's here to play
Player one and player two
We'll see this through
Close my eyes, make a wish
One more shot, I will not miss
Rock in!
Lost in this game, I feel the strain
But I'm pulled back up by your gravity
Your gravity
I see the shape, I feel the space
It's set in stone, carve it into me
I just wanna be Biboo, Biboo
